description.unified: Deals Magic Damage 3 times to enemies within range, applies [Flame] [3->1] stacks, and knocks them down for [???->3sec]. Afterward, for [15sec->5sec], Normal Attacks deal Magic Damage and apply [Flame] 1 stacks. DMG of this skill increases by 2% per [Flame] stack.
For [20sec->5sec], increases all allies’ M.DEF by {0} and M.Block Chance by [250->400], and applies [Flame] 1 times to nearby enemies every 1sec.
Deals Magic Damage 3 times to enemies within range and knocks them down. DMG increases by 2% per [Flame] stack.

On Block, deals Magic Damage to nearby enemies, applies [Flame] [3->5] stacks, and increases own M.DEF by [(added) 6%] for [???->6sec]. This effect stacks up to [(added) 5 times]. [Flame]: Deals 3% ATK M.DMG every 1sec for 20sec and reduces Heal Rate by 1%. This effect stacks up to 100 times.

IV.unified: M.Block Chance boost is increased by [50%->25 %].

light.unified: Attack Speed is increased by [200->30%] for [15 sec->3 sec].

dark.unified: For each enemy hit, cooldown is reduced by [6%->10%].

light.unified: Magic Block Chance is additionally increased by [20%->25%].

dark.unified: During the duration, deals damage to nearby enemies equal to 40% of your Magic Defense.

light.unified: When you block, the maximum number of Magic Defense increase stacks is changed to 10.

description.unified: [Burning Power] Increases DMG by {0}%, and Flame stacked upon enemies become irremovable.
[Lava Eruption] Increases DMG by {0}%, and reduces the target's M.DEF by 25% for 7 sec.
[Fire Smash] Increases the number of Flame Stacks by 3. Hit targets have their ATK Spd reduced by {0} for 5 sec.

On Normal Attack, has a 20% chance to reduce the target's ATK by {0}% and reduce [increased M.DMG->Magic DEF] by {1}% for [10 sec->5 sec]. If [Flame] has 100 or more stacks, the [Magic DEF reduction->Magic DEF reduction] is [doubled->multiplied by 2].
Deals Magic Damage to nearby enemies within a circular area and knocks them down for [3 sec->1.8sec]. Afterwards, summons Flame of Victory, Carprain for 13sec, increasing own ATK by [60%->45%].

1.from: For the duration of Skill, reduces M.DMG all allies take by 50%.
1.to: For the duration of Skill, reduces M.DMG all allies take by 14%.
1.unified: For the duration of Skill, reduces M.DMG all allies take by [50%->14%].

2.from: For the duration of Skill, Increases M.DMG all nearby enemies take by 40%. The effect is inflicted by 80% against Bosses.
2.to: For the duration of the soul, reduces M.DEF of nearby enemies by 22.5%. Against Bosses, reduces it by 45%.
2.unified: For the duration of the soul, reduces M.DEF of nearby enemies by [40% increased DMG->22.5% reduction]. Against Bosses, [the effect is inflicted by 80%->reduces it by 45%].
